The football manager who recruited David Beckham managed Manchester United during the timeframe **1992–1996**.

This is inferred from the context, which states that David Beckham joined Manchester United in 1992 and was part of the team during the 1995–96 season, which was the season in which Manchester United won the Double (Premier League and FA Cup). The recruitment of David Beckham occurred during the 1992–1993 season, and he remained with the club until the 1995–96 season.
